content: *마법봉, 고급 (주문시전자의 조율 필요)* --- 이 마법봉은 7개의 충전을 지니고 있습니다. 마법봉을 들고 있는 동안, 충전 1개를 소모하여 [거미줄](/1def7f5a1e8081cc8e63c5aaa24eeb2f?pvs=25)(내성 DC 13) 주문을 시전할 수 있습니다. - **충전 회복:** 이 마법봉은 매일 새벽에 1d6+1개의 소모된 충전을 회복합니다. 마지막 충전을 사용했다면 d20을 굴려야 하며, 1이 나올 경우 마법봉이 재가 되어 파괴됩니다. {color="red"} --- ![](https://prod-files-secure.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/8dffc202-0f6e-4adf-b208-fc378f0d8bf3/966dc71d-1307-4bd4-90f3-becdea331c80/638657414216920300.png?X-Amz-Algorithm=AWS4-HMAC-SHA256&X-Amz-Content-Sha256=UNSIGNED-PAYLOAD&X-Amz-Credential=ASIAZI2LB4667BPKEPPM%2F20260616%2Fus-west-2%2Fs3%2Faws4_request&X-Amz-Date=20260616T094346Z&X-Amz-Expires=3600&X-Amz-Security-Token=IQoJb3JpZ2luX2VjEKf%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2FwEaCXVzLXdlc3QtMiJIMEYCIQDjP6A6WhhZoozPQ9UcCBo89Mt4KUq8AdEJcnXrj6B93gIhAPTt24pthHzYfY6zV2IS4wMvTA0fnzaUDNjcYWdI8lOhKv8DCHAQABoMNjM3NDIzMTgzODA1Igy1BTf%2F7AsayNUlakkq3AP%2FXbxwBPrNB9PHc7R9YG1SzakRRTV3Mz1WCNAQhbiNxgjzRXT1hVq9VQB87Lv1PpbH2bzJIGdngak5irPitLh%2BOXKWXi8mRQCue3kOcsyu6NQMawmyIVmNLrL2ZiOVOe%2Bz3t9%2BUCbXK4Jp4sL4vJG2E7L2I2LOveOGFdUaawXpPr8P3pAAD7ymHfQH3S9o8VQh2Pg3xwkhJ%2BEGkpeoRlZMI51t11MC9L2TU3CSTLPut3nJ4zJZ6uvxSRIgevKHUaPBllZvS%2BWAmV9BGRPBXj1VyJCqz1okAIJPKccH%2B2S8ET115gw7nS1eN24ekc4%2F4GE%2FMAgVBb31pLwhh9X0svozjPfazFp9x1g0xlr59RqU02nYSWvRTYzJ16XEfW0L1chFFf3S6Jc%2FtKKSS4jIf%2BzMcU%2FRKRJrIQCy1dsFlR4eWedjdt7AEXwfGtt7wdxF1B%2B8klu3IWC7E4FZE%2BKHOj%2FsLeZ8%2Bgke7gev8RGLrAzAHbokaCQwQ9IpcRncy8v2F17vjfJrMa0%2F71E767nPfFErKYjX%2FRRlx584m6Vj%2Brq0V506LBaCvkQUuhI%2FC6RAix2g4dyUw73C4BrsCG2aFXGRmL1bk05hMBXCkBVeDcVbsnyB%2F8Vy6Oqbp0WEkDCC3cPRBjqkAZ%2BEINi5xVX0iogYikdaEDBCcYIYbp58cFC0OlGCpoDjkv7sVdFrBxOjoLwc5MOI%2FYPShgGmFk6W3wXxrjgj0fw3pTn8qbCG8JUDdBiPXy6megZecMxcyhEKAbBVzJB2mnroe9P583rabaN6eqllByy6ONGGlmmt4jw%2Fd6IkKAZIft6ujoqBD1da7xkSvWRjKJ0qkyw34Jiz7wClLsC%2F8yrwebB9&X-Amz-Signature=705aec745e94d046e12c07c64a88da6bf8edfb4168e083d2deec73589ba37959&X-Amz-SignedHeaders=host&x-amz-checksum-mode=ENABLED&x-id=GetObject)
